final:
module dram_cell (
    input wire clk,
    input wire [7:0] data_in,
    output reg [7:0] data_out,
    input wire read_en,
    input wire write_en,
    input wire [2:0] addr
);
    reg [7:0] memory [0:7]; // 8x8-bit memory

      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (write_en) begin
            memory[addr] <= data_in; // Write data to memory
        end
        if (read_en) begin
            data_out <= memory[addr]; // Read data from memory
        end
    end
endmodule
